catalog_content:
Item Name: Bakell - Gold Tinker Dust (4g, 1x Mini Spray Pump) Edible Glitter for Food, Desserts, and Beverages!
Bullet Point 1: 💕 Dual Use: When you buy Bakell's Tinker Dust, you're getting two products for the price of one! Tinker Dust (except certain golds) can be used as both a cake decorating dust and a beverage garnish! Add it to your favorite cocktail or soft drink to create a silky, shimmering effect that swirls your beverage to life!
Bullet Point 2: 👀 Our Tinker Dusts come in over 40 colors, ensuring you’ll find the perfect hue for cakes and vegan paint applications for any occasion.
Bullet Point 3: 🎂 🍸 Perfect for professional bakers, home cooks, and mixologists, Tinker Dust seamlessly infuses an enchanting sparkle into your confections and beverages.
Bullet Point 4: 🌿 We are the only edible glitter company whose products are made in the USA at SQF III, GMP, Halal, & Kosher certified facilities, & are nut free, gluten free, & vegan.
Bullet Point 5: 🎉 Perfect for gender reveal parties, holidays, birthdays, weddings, graduations, cakes, cocktails, mocktails, cookies, desserts, beer, garnishes, juice, teas, lemonade, coffee, & even crafts!
Bullet Point 6: 🎯 The convenient mini-pump design provides ease and precision of Tinker Dust for your food and drinks.
Bullet Point 7: 🛡️ Red No. 3 Free: Bakell prioritizes your health by carefully selecting the highest quality ingredients, to create the safest and best product on the market. Our Tinker Dust is also gluten free, dairy free, GMO free and vegan.
Product Description: Gold Tinker Dust is a beautiful, food grade edible glitter made with larger particles than Luster Dust to give it that “glitter look!" Perfect for cake decorating, cupcakes, cookies, fruit and even beverages! The convenient mini spray pump design ensures precise application to your culinary creations. This Tinker Dust is vegan, Red No. 3 (Erythrosine) free, gluten free, dairy free, nut free and GMO free. Whether you're a professional baker, a passionate home cook, or a mixologist, Tinker Dust is a seamless way to infuse a sparkle into your edible creations, adding a visually appealing touch to every treat.

catalog_content:
Item Name: Food to Live Organic Shredded Coconut, 10 Pounds Non-GMO, Unsweetened Flakes, Desiccated, Medium Shreds, Kosher, Vegan, Bulk. No Sulfites Added. Rich in Dietary Fiber. For Baking, as a Topping.
Bullet Point 1: ✔️ORGANIC PRODUCT: Food to Live unsweetened shredded coconut is 100% safe and delicious.
Bullet Point 2: ✔️NUTRITIOUS: Organic Coconut is rich in protein, fiber, iron, and zinc.
Bullet Point 3: ✔️DELICIOUS DESSERTS: Use our delicious coconut flakes to make cookies and desserts.
Bullet Point 4: ✔️VERSATILITY: You can make sauces and dips from dried coconut powder.
Product Description: Dried coconut shreds from Food to Live are good for you because they are delicious, and nutritious. They are Non-GMO so you can include them in any meal plan. Shredded coconut is made by shredding raw coconut fruit ‘meat’. You can use it to make desiccated coconut at home by drying our coconut shreds in a dehydrator or an oven (desiccated means moisture-free). The result can be ground into a fine coconut powder. Shredded coconut won’t go bad for up to 6 months. Store it in an airtight bag in a pantry or fridge. Make sure it stays dry! Nutritional Value There are too many coconut benefits to list them all. The coconut nutrition value is the most important of them. This food is rich in fiber and minerals, especially iron and zinc. Directions Food to Live Organic Coconut is shredded to a medium size, which makes it perfect for cooking. You can use our dried coconut as topping for sandwiches, salads, and desserts. You can soak it in water and pulse in a blender to make some coconut milk. Dried coconut powder that can be used for making delicious sauces and dips.Check out this classic recipe for shredded coconut cookies: Ingredients:- 14 oz shredded coconut - 1 cup sugar - ½ tsp salt - ¼ tsp baking powder - 1 egg - ½ cup unsalted butter - 1 ½ cup flour - 1 tsp vanilla extract Instructions: 1. Preheat the oven to 350F. 2. Process all the ingredients save the egg, flour, and vanilla in a food processor until finely ground. 3. Add the vanilla and egg. Pulse some more. 4. Add flour and process until you get crumbly dough. 5. Form small balls and bake 20-25 minutes. This product is processed in a facility that also processes tree nuts and wheat.
Value: 160.0
Unit: Ounce
overall_summary: Organic, non-GMO shredded coconut positioned as a versatile, health-focused ingredient for baking and cooking. Bulk 10-pound packaging suggests value-oriented pricing, while organic certification and nutritional claims justify a premium over conventional options. Resealable design indicates freshness focus, and the absence of additives or sulfites appeals to health-conscious consumers.
